"'''Urchins'''" was a comic appearing in [[Star Wars Tales 14|''Star Wars Tales'' 14]] and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 2]]''.

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and his friends find a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], that [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] had bought from a peddler. While Watto realizes he has to bet against [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] to keep his shop. While checking out Sebulba's new [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]], [[W. Wald]] accidentally drops the lightsaber into the engine, and, while Anakin tries to retrieve it, it ignites and severs some cables. Anakin and his friends flee once Sebulba notices them. After arrving back at the shop, Anakin suggest putting the lightsaber away and promises to have a lightsaber one day, causing his friend to laugh at Anakin. The next day, Watto wins his bet when Sebulba's engines short out.
